body.docName: 预算方案预算使用情况查询
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/budget/page-query-budget-detail 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/budget/page-query-budget-detail 
 ## 接口描述 
本接口适用于通过预算方案编码、预算方案名称、预算周期类型、预算组织编码、预算科目名称、预算期数查询智能费控预算方案使用详情，包含预算方案基础信息、预算方案总期数、预算方案每期额度等信息。 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetPlanId","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"BUDGETPLAN1670331363596","desc":"%20%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetPlanName","label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%96%B9%E6%A1%88%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE","desc":"%20%E9%9D%9E%E5%BF%85%E5%A1%AB%EF%BC%8C%E4%BC%A0%E5%80%BC%E5%88%99%E4%BD%9C%E4%B8%BA%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%9D%A1%E4%BB%B6","maxLength":"120"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetCycle","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E5%91%A8%E6%9C%9F%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"1","desc":"%201%3A%E6%9C%88%E5%BA%A6%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%EF%BC%8C2%3A%E5%AD%A3%E5%BA%A6%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%EF%BC%8C3%3A%E5%B9%B4%E5%BA%A6%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E3%80%82","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"budgetOrgIdList","required":false,"maxLength":"100","label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88","exampleValue":"%5B%22BUDGETORG0005%22%5D","desc":"%201%EF%BC%8C%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%87100%E4%B8%AA%0A2%EF%BC%8C%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%9D%A1%E4%BB%B6%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%92%8C%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E4%B8%8D%E5%8F%AF%E5%90%8C%E6%97%B6%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"budgetSubjectNameList","maxLength":"100","label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88","exampleValue":"%5B%22%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%95%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE120601%22%5D","desc":"%201%EF%BC%8C%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%87100%E4%B8%AA%0A2%EF%BC%8C%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%9D%A1%E4%BB%B6%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%92%8C%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E4%B8%8D%E5%8F%AF%E5%90%8C%E6%97%B6%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"periodNumbers","maxLength":"100","label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%9C%9F%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"%5B1%2C2%5D","desc":"%201%EF%BC%8C%E9%9D%9E%E5%BF%85%E5%A1%AB%EF%BC%8C%E4%BC%A0%E5%80%BC%E5%88%99%E4%BD%9C%E4%B8%BA%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%9D%A1%E4%BB%B6%0A2%EF%BC%8C%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E6%9C%9F%E6%95%B0%E9%9B%86%E5%90%88%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%87100%E4%B8%AA"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"start","label":"%E8%B5%B7%E5%A7%8B%E8%A1%8C%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%201%EF%BC%8C%E5%88%86%E9%A1%B5%E8%B5%B7%E5%A7%8B%E4%BD%8D%E7%BD%AE%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%0A2%EF%BC%8C%E5%88%86%E9%A1%B5%E8%B5%B7%E5%A7%8B%E4%BD%8D%E7%BD%AE%E6%9C%80%E5%B0%8F%E4%BB%8E0%E5%BC%80%E5%A7%8B","maxLength":"3","required":true}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"limit","label":"%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E8%A1%8C%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"10","desc":"%201%EF%BC%8C%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%A7%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81100%E6%9D%A1%E4%B8%80%E9%A1%B5%0A2%EF%BC%8C%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%AF%8F%E9%A1%B5%E5%A4%A7%E5%B0%8F%E6%9C%80%E5%B0%8F%E4%B8%BA1%0A3%EF%BC%8C%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E6%AF%8F%E9%A1%B5%E5%A4%A7%E5%B0%8F%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%0A4%EF%BC%8C%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E5%80%BC20","maxLength":"100","required":true}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable> ","name":"message","required":true,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求报文
```json
{
	 "start": 0,
	  "limit": 10,
	  "budgetPlanId" : "BUDGETPLAN1670331363596", 
	  "budgetPlanName" : "预算方案部门科目",  
	  "budgetCycle" : "1",  
	  "budgetOrgIdList" : ["BUDGETORG0005"], 
	  "budgetSubjectNameList":["测试科目120601"],  
	  "periodNumbers": [1,2] 
}
```
### 响应报文
```json
{
    "data": {
        "total": 1,
        "list": [
            {
                "budgetPlanId": "BUDGETPLAN1670331363596",
                "budgetPlanName": "预算方案部门科目",
                "budgetCycle": "1",
                "budgetDimension": "3",
                "orgId": "BUDGETORG0005",
                "orgName": "开发一组",
                "subjectName": "测试科目120601",
                "orgOtherState": false,
                "subjectOtherState": false,
                "period": 2,
                "quotaOfEachPeriods": [
                    {
                        "periodNumber": 1,
                        "initialQuota": 400.00,
                        "usedQuota": 0.00,
                        "freezedQuota": 0.00,
                        "remainQuota": 400.00,
                        "reservedQuota": 0.00,
                        "startDate": "2022-10-01 00:00:00",
                        "endDate": "2022-10-31 00:00:00"
                    },
                    {
                        "periodNumber": 2,
                        "initialQuota": 200.00,
                        "usedQuota": 0.00,
                        "freezedQuota": 0.00,
                        "remainQuota": 200.00,
                        "reservedQuota": 0.00,
                        "startDate": "2022-11-01 00:00:00",
                        "endDate": "2022-11-30 00:00:00"
                    }
                ]
            }
        ]
    },
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
sucess为查询成功状态， true为成功 其余都是失败
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/budget/page-query-budget-detail

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/budget/page-query-budget-detail

接口描述

本接口适用于通过预算方案编码、预算方案名称、预算周期类型、预算组织编码、预算科目名称、预算期数查询智能费控预算方案使用详情，包含预算方案基础信息、预算方案总期数、预算方案每期额度等信息。

调用方式

METHOD: POST
